suite.name: Auth

test.name: Me cant be accessed without an account

test.doc: Login fails if user does not exist

test.name: Register

kw.name: Register
kw.doc: Shortcut to register with the given username for future requests

kw.name: Login user-duplicate
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Login user-duplicate' found. Did you try using keyword 'BuiltIn.Log' or 'Login' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

kw.name: DELETE
kw.doc: *Sends a DELETE request to the endpoint.*

test.doc: If two users tries to register with the same username, it fails
test.status: No keyword with name 'Login user-duplicate' found. Did you try using keyword 'BuiltIn.Log' or 'Login' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: Delete Account

kw.doc: Shortcut to register with the given username for future requests

test.name: Login

kw.name: Register
kw.doc: Shortcut to register with the given username for future requests

kw.name: POST
kw.doc: *Sends a POST request to the endpoint.*
kw.msg: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /auth/register (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x104630280>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))

kw.name: DELETE
kw.doc: *Sends a DELETE request to the endpoint.*
kw.msg: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /auth/me (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x10464b3a0>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))
kw.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /auth/me (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x10464b3a0>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))

test.doc: Create a new user and login in it
test.status:
ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /auth/register (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x104630280>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))
Also teardown failed: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=3000): Max retries exceeded with url: /auth/me (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x10464b3a0>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused'))

suite.doc: Tests of the /auth route. Ensures that the user can authenticate on kyoo.
